creator: carl@slackerbsd.org
text:
Building the cvsup-devel port requires lang/pm3-base which is failing to build
on -CURRENT.

In file included from RTHeapDepC.c:101:
/usr/include/nfs/nfs.h:207: syntax error before `NFSKERBKEY_T'
/usr/include/nfs/nfs.h:218: syntax error before `NFSKERBKEY_T'
gmake[1]: *** [RTHeapDepC.o] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory
`/usr/ports/lang/pm3-base/work/pm3-1.1.15/boot-FreeBSD4/m3core/FreeBSD4'
gmake: *** [boot] Error 2

Fix: 

Oi. If only I knew. =\
There doesn't appear to be anything wrong with nfs.h with my limited C
knowledge.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net/cvsup-devel && make -DWITHOUT_X11 M3FLAGS="-DSTATIC"
(will build pm3-base as a dependency)
